description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray materials, with large glass windows and sliding doors that open onto a spacious patio. The property features a swimming pool with an organic shape, surrounded by outdoor furniture, a hammock, and a blossoming tree, creating a luxurious backyard setting. A driveway leads to a garage, and the front yard is landscaped with manicured grass and tall, slender shrubs. The rooftop includes a sun deck and solar panels, emphasizing contemporary, eco-friendly design. The house is surrounded by open space, with a trampoline and additional seating areas visible in the yard.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on open spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, pool, outdoor furniture, and landscaping details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, garage, rooftop deck, and the overall structure of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, trampoline, and additional outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a large glass door, integrated into the patio area
